property.name: defaultFilter
property.label: Default Planner Filter
property.description: Supported values: all, coverage, whitespace, risk, validation.

property.name: maxVisibleGroups
property.label: Max Visible Groups
property.description: Maximum number of ranked groups to request and show.

property.name: summaryMetricLimit
property.label: Summary Metric Count
property.description: How many summary KPI chips to show in the dashboard module.

property.name: maxTimelineItems
property.label: Timeline Event Count
property.description: Maximum number of planning timeline events to show.

property.name: boardDensity
property.label: Board Density
property.description: Use compact or expanded to control how much detail the ranked board shows.

property.name: showSummaryPanel
property.label: Show Summary Dashboard
property.description: Show or hide the analytical dashboard module.

property.name: showTimelinePanel
property.label: Show Timeline
property.description: Show or hide the planning chronology module.

property.name: showActionRail
property.label: Show Action Rail
property.description: Show or hide the leadership action queue.

property.name: showExecutivePrompts
property.label: Show Executive Prompts
property.description: Show or hide the executive prompt copy in each ranked card.
